title: Grilled Chicken Skewers with Spring Vegetables
description: A refreshing and flavorful summer dish featuring marinated chicken and spring vegetables grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: italian spring vegetables (bell peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes)

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the chicken and spring vegetables to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the chicken and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
6. Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges and fresh herbs.
